scan_targets: dispatch logs (anima/state/v11_*/poll.log) for skipped diagnosis OR retry-blind patterns
violation_signatures: raw 12 silent-error-ban: failure event with NO root-cause-diagnosis paragraph in verdict
monkey-patch: /tmp/*_wrapper.py edits NOT mirrored back to canonical helper after success
scale-down without diagnosis: --n-prompts/N reduction in retry attempt without explicit memory-budget probe rationale
selftest_fixtures: PASS: failure with all 4 steps documented

axis_b.name: L3 os-level OR atlas anchor design candidates

candidates.description: ~/.claude/settings.json PreToolUse Bash matcher detects 'kill -9 retry' OR 'rm -rf /tmp/*_wrapper.py && relaunch' patterns; permission-decision=ask. risk: hook-only (raw 75 single-layer leak)
candidates.blocker_rationale: PreToolUse alone bypassable by direct fs

candidates.description: CANON/atlas/atlas.n6 R-new entry @P compute_resource_failure_discipline_4_step_mandate. risk: atlas master uchg-locked at CANON; needs owner approval
canonical helper paths (tool/anima_runpod_orchestrator.hexa, tool/anima_cmt.hexa) get chflags uchg lock — direct edits without unlock-edit-relock blocked at OS layer
atlas anchor (B) + chflags uchg on canonical helpers (C) = 2 distinct OS-level layers + L1 advisory + L2 lint = 4 layers with margin

axis_b.recommendation: Option D (atlas anchor + canonical helper chflags uchg) — 4-layer with margin

falsifiers.criterion: 30d post-promotion: lint coverage on dispatch surfaces ≥ 0.50 (≥50% of failure events have all 4 steps documented in verdict)
3+ legitimate failures cannot satisfy 4-step mandate (e.g. ephemeral cloud API failure with no actionable diagnosis path)
false-positive ratio > 20% on lint scans (legitimate workflow flagged as undisciplined)
average diagnosis-to-canonical-fix latency > 7d = governance friction induced
